message.content:
@startuml
actor User

participant "UpdateUserServlet" as servlet
participant "userDto:UserDto" as dto
participant "userDao:UserDao" as dao
participant "users" as users

User -> servlet
activate servlet

servlet -> dto : 生成
activate dto

servlet -> dto : setId(id)
servlet -> dto : setUserId(user_id)
servlet -> dto : setUserPass(User_password)
servlet -> dto : setUserName(user_name)
servlet -> dto : setAddress(address)
servlet -> dto : setSubAddress(address_sub)
servlet -> dto : setTel(tel)
servlet -> dto : setGender(gender)

servlet -> dao : 生成
activate dao

servlet -> dao : updateUser(userDto)

dao -> users : UPDATE文実行
activate users
users --> dao : true/false
deactivate users

dao --> servlet : true/false
deactivate dao
deactivate dto
deactivate servlet

@enduml
